claude_md.description: The full contents of the root CLAUDE.md file. Markdown format. Be comprehensive — as long as needed, every line load-bearing.

subdirectory_claude_mds.description: CLAUDE.md files for subdirectories with distinct conventions. Aim for 5-15 files.

content.description: Markdown content for this subdirectory CLAUDE.md. Self-contained, as detailed as needed.
